task_completion.description: Load the landsat_multispectral.tif file into ESA SNAP Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Product Explorer pane in SNAP shows 'landsat_multispectral' loaded as a product, with its bands (band_1 to band_4) available.

task_completion.description: Create View 1 with RGB mapped to band_1, band_2, and band_3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An RGB image window is open. The 'Open RGB Image Window' dialog or the Color Manipulation pane confirms the mapping: Red=band_1, Green=band_2, Blue=band_3.

task_completion.description: Create View 2 with RGB mapped to band_2, band_3, and band_4.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second RGB image window is open. The 'Open RGB Image Window' dialog or the Color Manipulation pane confirms the mapping: Red=band_2, Green=band_3, Blue=band_4.

task_completion.description: Configure the workspace to show both views simultaneously (dual-view).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Both RGB image windows (View 1 and View 2) are visible side-by-side or tiled vertically in the SNAP workspace.

task_completion.description: Draw a vector Region of Interest (ROI) over an area in one of the views.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A vector shape (e.g., polygon, rectangle) is drawn on top of the image in one of the views, and/or a new vector data node (e.g., 'geometry') appears under the Vector Data folder in the Product Explorer.

task_completion.description: Export a visual snapshot of the workspace to view_snapshot.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export Image' or 'Save' dialog in SNAP showing the path '/home/ga/snap_exports/view_snapshot.png', or a terminal/file manager verifying the file exists.

task_completion.description: Save the modified product in BEAM-DIMAP format to investigation_product.dim.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Product' dialog in SNAP showing the path '/home/ga/snap_exports/investigation_product.dim', or a terminal/file manager verifying the file exists.

task_completion.description: Save the SNAP session to investigation_session.snap.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Session' dialog in SNAP showing the path '/home/ga/snap_exports/investigation_session.snap', or a terminal/file manager verifying the file exists.

integrity.description: The agent used the ESA SNAP Desktop GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the SNAP graphical interface (menus, dialogs, toolbars) rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: The ROI was created using SNAP's vector tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The vector drawing tools in SNAP are selected and used on the image view, rather than importing a pre-made vector or faking the node.

integrity.description: The output files were generated by SNAP, not mocked via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses SNAP's 'Save Product', 'Save Session', and 'Export Image' functionalities, rather than using 'touch' or 'cp' commands in the terminal to create empty/fake files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input data is located at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. The agent must generate three specific output files: a PNG snapshot at /home/ga/snap_exports/view_snapshot.png, a BEAM-DIMAP product at /home/ga/snap_exports/investigation_product.dim, and a SNAP session file at /home/ga/snap_exports/investigation_session.snap.
